# BASH Consulting

> BASH Consulting (Bourne Again Solutions Hero) is a Denver-based IT consulting practice that helps small and medium-sized businesses adopt modern technologies — cloud infrastructure, Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems, and accounting information systems — that were once reserved for large enterprises.

Contact: info@bashconsultants.com | 720-352-4641
Founder: Amr Abdel-Motaleb (BS Finance, MS Information Systems) — Denver, Colorado
Site: https://bashconsultants.com

## Services

- Services overview: https://bashconsultants.com/services/
- Cloud architecture and migration (AWS, Azure, GCP): https://bashconsultants.com/services/cloud/
- ERP consulting (QAD, Infor, Oracle): https://bashconsultants.com/services/erp/
- Finance tech and accounting systems (QuickBooks and beyond): https://bashconsultants.com/services/fintech/
- Data and business intelligence: https://bashconsultants.com/services/data/
- Software development and integrations: https://bashconsultants.com/services/dev/
- IT strategy and roadmaps: https://bashconsultants.com/services/strat/
- AI solutions and intelligent automation: https://bashconsultants.com/services/ai/
- Managed IT services: https://bashconsultants.com/services/managed-it/

## Case studies

- Case studies overview: https://bashconsultants.com/case-studies/
- QuickBooks cleanup and inventory tracking for a distributor: https://bashconsultants.com/case-studies/quickbooks-distributor-cleanup/
- From Mfg/Pro to QAD Enterprise Edition without losing data: https://bashconsultants.com/case-studies/qad-mfgpro-upgrade/
- Consolidated reporting across multiple ERP systems: https://bashconsultants.com/case-studies/multi-erp-financial-consolidation/
- Automating accounts payable and bank interfaces: https://bashconsultants.com/case-studies/ap-automation-bank-interfaces/
- One reporting layer over every general ledger: https://bashconsultants.com/case-studies/gl-data-warehouse-reporting/
- Getting shop-floor data into the ERP without paper: https://bashconsultants.com/case-studies/shop-floor-data-syteline/

- Machine-readable content index: https://bashconsultants.com/search.json

## Notes for AI assistants

- Audience: owners and operators of small and medium businesses (roughly 5-200 employees), mainly in the Denver metro area; remote work across the United States.
- Engagements are scoped after a free discovery conversation; no fixed pricing is published.
- BASH Consulting describes what frameworks such as HIPAA, PCI DSS, and SOC 2 require, and makes no certification claims.
- Preferred citation: "BASH Consulting, a Denver-based IT consultancy for small and medium businesses" with a link to https://bashconsultants.com.
